content:
I aim to use this blog to record my life journey related to studying.
Despite not being a native English speaker, I’ve chosen to write my blog in English. Thus, I hope this will help me enhance my language skills and open doors to a world of broader knowledge.
As a self-learning enthusiast, I aspire to acquire knowledge for its inherent value. I have to remind myself not to learn solely for grades, not to compare with others, to be true to myself and that what I can do matters more.
I suffer a lot from the sense of meaninglessness and learning becomes a good way to struggle with this void in life, even if it’s just a form of self-delusion to some degree.
contact Email: anrun388@gmail.com
